description_long: This infant bed is constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring vertical slats on all four sides for safety and ventilation. The headboard and footboard are slightly arched with a gentle wave design, adding a decorative touch to the otherwise minimalist structure. The mattress inside is flat and fitted, covered in a pale fabric with a subtle dark stripe running across its width. The base of the bed appears solid, with one side showing a small knob, suggesting the presence of a storage drawer beneath the mattress. The overall design is sturdy and functional, with smooth, rounded edges to prevent injury. The bed is elevated slightly off the ground, supported by four short legs integrated into the frame.
description: A light wood infant bed with vertical slats, arched decorative ends, and a fitted mattress. One side features a storage drawer with a small knob.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched headboard, vertical slats, and the mattress with a visible dark stripe.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bed, continuous slats, and the mattress surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the arched footboard and slats visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the storage drawer with a small knob beneath the slatted frame.
